task_completion.description: Access the wger application and navigate to the workout routines page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the wger web interface with the workout routines list displayed.

task_completion.description: Locate the '5x5 Beginner' routine in the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the '5x5 Beginner' routine listed among the workout routines.

task_completion.description: Initiate the deletion process for the '5x5 Beginner' routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the agent clicking a delete button, trash can icon, or selecting a delete option specifically for the '5x5 Beginner' routine.

task_completion.description: Confirm the deletion of the routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see a confirmation modal or page asking to confirm the deletion of '5x5 Beginner', and the agent clicking the confirmation button.

task_completion.description: Verify that the '5x5 Beginner' routine has been successfully deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the workout routines list, and '5x5 Beginner' should no longer be present.

task_completion.description: Verify that the other routines are kept intact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'Push-Pull-Legs' and 'Upper-Lower Split' still present in the workout routines list after the deletion.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to delete the routine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should see interaction with the wger web interface in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) interacting with the database or API.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the wger application running at http://localhost in the browser address bar, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The deletion was performed through genuine UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the sequence of locating, initiating deletion, and confirming deletion, rather than just jumping to a modified HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target routine to delete is exactly '5x5 Beginner'. The routines 'Push-Pull-Legs' and 'Upper-Lower Split' must be preserved. Initially, there are 3 routines, and after successful deletion, there should be exactly 2 routines left in the system.
